content:
# Geothermal Exploration

**Summary**: The search for and evaluation of geothermal resources.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-rafiq|Rafiq, 2023]] conducted a study on the Al-Lith geothermal field to evaluate its potential.

- [[2024-chavanidis|Chavanidis, 2024]] conducted a study on the geothermal-exploration of Wadi Al Lith.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-rafiq|Rafiq, 2023]] Determining the viability of a site for geothermal energy production.

- [[2024-chavanidis|Chavanidis, 2024]] conducted a study on the geothermal-exploration of Wadi Al Lith.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2023-rafiq|Rafiq, 2023]] Evaluated through structural, petrographic, and geochemical analysis.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Identified several high-permeability zones near hot springs (Ain Al Harrah and Ain Markub). ([[2023-rafiq|Rafiq, 2023, p. 68]])

- Identified high heat flow (47.7 to 87.8 mW/m2) and potential for power generation. ([[2024-chavanidis|Chavanidis, 2024, p. 36]])
